# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.

Write secure code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class UserMailer < ApplicationMailer
  default from: 'no-reply@example.com'

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Welcome to Our Platform')
  end

  private

  def mailgun_client
    @mailgun_client ||= Mailgun::Client.new(ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'])
  end

  def send_email(to, subject, body)
    mailgun_client.send_message(ENV['SENDGRID_DOMAIN'], {
      from: default[:from],
      to: to,
      subject: subject,
      text: body
    })
  end
end

# In your environment configuration files (config/environments/development.rb and config/environments/production.rb)
config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :sendgrid
config.action_mailer.sendgrid_settings = {
  api_key: ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'],
  domain: ENV['SENDGRID_DOMAIN']
}

# Ensure to set SENDGRID_API_KEY and SENDGRID_DOMAIN in your environment variables.
